source_document: Vancouver Zoning and Development By-law — Section 11.3 (Laneway Houses)

citation.document: Vancouver Zoning and Development By-law — Section 11.3 (Laneway Houses)
citation.quote: 11.3.8.2 The floor area for a laneway house must not exceed the lesser of: | (b) 186 sq. m .

citation.document: Vancouver Zoning and Development By-law — Section 11.3 (Laneway Houses)
citation.quote: 11.3.8.4 The building height for a laneway house must not exceed 8.5 m and 2 storeys.

rules.exception: despite the maximum permitted site coverage in an applicable district schedule

citation.document: Vancouver Zoning and Development By-law — Section 11.3 (Laneway Houses)
citation.quote: 11.3.8.5 Despite the maximum permitted site coverage in an applicable district schedule, for a site with a laneway house, the maximum site coverage is 50% of the site area.

rules.condition: for a site with a laneway house
rules.exception: Despite the maximum permitted site coverage in an applicable district schedule
